channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The U.S. Must Expand Its Strategic Petroleum Reserve
item.description: A restored and growing reserve is vital for deterrence, economic stability, and national security.

item.title: America Is Winning and Iran Is Losing Badly
item.description: With its economy and military in crisis, the Iranian regime faces a U.S. foreign policy not driven by fear.

item.title: Space to Fail
item.description: Blue Origin's recent rocket explosion should not hinder our forward-looking approach to 21st-century space exploration.

item.title: A Boola Boola Revolution
item.description: Yale, New Haven, John Trumbull, and the American Revolution.
